examples: He found a towel and gave his body a vigorous rubdown.
I was getting a rubdown on the next table to him.
You don't have to take a class to give yourself a proper rubdown.
Sunset Rubdown strives for greatness, and on the way there, it crafts an eccentric, surprisingly rich musical panorama.
Sunset Rubdown's Spencer Krug is known primarily for his role as co-leader of the masterful carnival-rock band Wolf Parade.
